Request For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, LITHOGRAPHIX, INC., a Corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PHOTON USA CORP., a corporation, which will do business in California as PHOTON PUBLISING USA CORP.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
Declarations filed in support of Default Prove-Up are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $92,131.50
Pre-Judgment Interest: $29,532.56
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $765.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $123,429.06
Judgment signed in open court.
